conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well."
new_constraint: Avoid using the word "message" in the opening sentence of the email.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well." Avoid using the word "message" in the opening sentence of the email.
response:
Subject: Request for a Product Demo

I hope this email finds you well.

My name is [Your Name] and I am writing to inquire about a demonstration of your software solution. We have been following your company's work and are very interested in seeing how your product can address our specific needs.

Could you please let me know your availability for a brief demo next week? Alternatively, if you have a recorded walkthrough available, that would also be helpful.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Job Title]  
[Your Company]  
[Your Contact Information]
evaluation_result:
